content: ZWO file format: XML root workout_file containing name, author, description, sportType='bike', ftpOverride. Child element workout contains segment types: SteadyState (Duration secs, Power as FTP decimal 0.0-2.0, optional Cadence), IntervalsT (Repeat, OnDuration, OffDuration, OnPower, OffPower, Cadence), Ramp (Duration, PowerLow, PowerHigh), Warmup, Cooldown, FreeRide. textevent child elements add in-workout messages. Power is always fraction of FTP (e.g. 0.75 = 75% FTP). Files saved in ~/Documents/Zwift/Workouts/.
